# Archived non-team bio assets

These files were moved from assets/images/bio after a Team-page cross-reference.

Selection rule:
- Keep assets whose filename matches a Team member name (including alumni) from _data/authors.yml.
- Keep assets directly referenced by local avatar paths in _data/authors.yml.
- Move non-matching files to this archive folder.

Restore:
- Move any needed file back to assets/images/bio and update _data/authors.yml avatar paths if required.
